creator: dreamcat4@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 145536
svn diff on head 2 - REASON: missing dependancy

Minor update to this patch:

+p5-DateTime-Format-Strptime>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-DateTime-Format-Strptime \
+p5-JSON>=0:${PORTSDIR}/converters/p5-JSON

Because missing dependancies for the included 'tv_grab_eu_epgdata', 'tv_grab_na_dtv', and 'tv_grab_dk_dr' programs.

I have no more changes now. Please take as final submission.
